tasks.name: Add logoCloud section to homepage content config
tasks.purpose: Configure logo cloud heading text and marquee speed settings for the redesigned section

constraints: Use TypeScript interface for type safety
Heading text: 'Trusted by professionals at'
Marquee speed: 30 (default from existing component)

tasks.input_state: homepage-content.config.ts exists with hero, sticky, features, testimonials, essentialReads, pricing sections
tasks.output_state: homepage-content.config.ts includes logoCloud section with heading and marqueeSpeed properties
tasks.acceptance_criterion: logoCloud config object exists with heading text and marqueeSpeed property
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'logoCloud:' apps/web/config/homepage-content.config.ts && grep -q 'Trusted by professionals at' apps/web/config/homepage-content.config.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add single-row mode to LogoCloudMarquee component
tasks.purpose: Enable LogoCloudMarquee to render as single continuous row instead of dual rows for new homepage design

constraints: Preserve existing dual-row behavior (backward compatibility)
Add 'mode' prop: 'dual' (default) | 'single'
Single mode: use all logos in one Marquee component
Keep gradient edge fades on both sides
Keep grayscale opacity-90 with hover:opacity-100 transition

tasks.input_state: LogoCloudMarquee component renders dual-row marquee with logos, gradient fades, hover effects
tasks.output_state: LogoCloudMarquee accepts mode prop ('single' | 'dual'), renders single continuous row when mode='single'
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component accepts mode='single' prop and renders all 15 logos in single continuous marquee with gradient fades

tasks.name: Update home-logo-cloud-client wrapper for dark theme
tasks.purpose: Apply dark design tokens from I1 and pass single-row mode to LogoCloudMarquee

constraints: Pass mode='single' prop to LogoCloudMarquee
Pass heading from config (Trusted by professionals at)
Remove description (not needed in single-row mode)
Apply dark background (bg-background or #0a0a0f)
Apply text color for dark theme (text-foreground)

tasks.input_state: home-logo-cloud-client.tsx wraps LogoCloudMarquee with dynamic import and SSR loading state
tasks.output_state: home-logo-cloud-client passes mode='single', heading from config, dark theme styling to LogoCloudMarquee
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Wrapper component renders LogoCloudMarquee with mode='single', configured heading, and dark theme classes

tasks.name: Wire logo cloud section in homepage with AnimateOnScroll

action.target: logo cloud section to homepage with AnimateOnScroll

tasks.purpose: Integrate restyled logo cloud into homepage between Product Preview and Statistics sections with viewport entrance animation

dependencies: spacing.section, containerBase, widths.content patterns from page.tsx
constraints: Wrap LogoCloudMarquee in AnimateOnScroll with fade-in animation
Position section between Product Preview and Statistics sections
Use standard spacing.section, containerBase, widths.content patterns
Apply dark background (dark:bg-background or bg-[#0a0a0f])
Update gradient fade classes for dark theme: from-background, via-background/90

tasks.input_state: Homepage has Product Preview section, no logo cloud section between it and next section
tasks.output_state: Logo cloud section rendered between Product Preview and Statistics with AnimateOnScroll wrapper and dark theme
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Logo cloud section exists in homepage with AnimateOnScroll, positioned between Product Preview and Statistics, with dark background
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'AnimateOnScroll' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/page.tsx && grep -q 'LogoCloudMarquee' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/page.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Validate logo cloud rendering and styling

action.target: logo cloud section rendering and styling

tasks.purpose: Verify single-row marquee, grayscale logos, hover effects, gradient fades, dark theme, and AnimateOnScroll animation work correctly

constraints: Verify 15 greyscale logos load
Verify single continuous row (not dual rows)
Verify heading text: 'Trusted by professionals at'
Verify gradient fades on left/right edges
Verify hover opacity transition works
Verify AnimateOnScroll fade-in on viewport entry
Run pnpm typecheck and pnpm lint

tasks.input_state: All logo cloud code changes are complete
tasks.output_state: Logo cloud section validated for functionality, styling, and code quality
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Logo cloud renders correctly, all interactions work, typecheck and lint pass
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && agent-browser open http://localhost:3000 && agent-browser wait 3000 && agent-browser is visible 'Trusted by professionals at'
